message:
feat(search): add FSVI vector index bridge + B4 migration adapter (ft-dr6zv.1.3.5)

Add FsviAdapter wrapping frankensearch VectorIndex with u64↔string doc_id
mapping, FTVI→FSVI format conversion, soft delete, and WAL-based incremental
updates. Add vector_index_backend config to OrchestratorConfig. 455 search
tests pass (18 new bridge + 3 new orchestrator B4 + all existing).

Closes ft-dr6zv.1.3.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
